structurePatterns: Concrete set = Lucide (ISC); linear, monochrome, no fill, round cap+join
24-grid native stroke 2px; effective stroke scales with size (16px≈1.3 / 20px≈1.7 / 24px=2)
currentColor inherits ink token — icons are never colored, never accent-blue-filled
usageHints: Icons are for navigation / send / toolbar — not decorative filler in content
Status icons must be paired with text (differentiate without color)
Icon-only buttons must carry an accessible name (aria-label)
Semantic name (i-success) is stable; underlying Lucide name is recorded in icons/icons.json — swap source without touching call sites
Track sources: web/Office/email = Lucide; macOS app = SF Symbols by name (not yet landed)
doNotInvent: Brand-colored file-type icons — use a DOCX text badge
Icons as the sole carrier of meaning without an accessible name
unknowns: SF Symbols per-name mapping for the macOS app track (deferred)
